loop1.title: Context Rail Header (Overview / Section / Feeder)
loop1.note: Showing aggregated panel readings from 6 active outgoing feeders; 2 outgoing feeders (UPS-05, UPS-06) and 2 incomers are dark (no data).

loop1.title: Real Time Monitoring (Feeder Heatmap)
loop1.note: Showing real-time power distribution for all feeders; load percentage (loadPct) is omitted because the member meters lack a rated_kva nameplate to calculate the percentage.

loop1.title: Total Feeder Consumption / Supply
loop1.note: Showing total active power — per-phase power isn't measured for this asset; capacity utilization (denominator/consumedPct) is blank because the asset's nameplate rating is unknown.

loop1.title: Consumption Trend / Supply Trend
loop1.note: Showing panel aggregate consumption trend from 6 active outgoing feeders (GIC-01-N3-UPS-01, GIC-01-N4-UPS-02, GIC-01-N5-UPS-03, GIC-01-N8-BPDB-01, GIC-02-N2-BPDB-02, GIC-02-N5-UPS-04); 2 feeders (GIC-02-N6-UPS-05, GIC-02-N7-UPS-06) are dark and honest-blanked.

loop1.title: Quick Stats
loop1.note: Showing per-member panel rollup (Voltage, Current Unbalance, Load) — panel aggregate table is a stub; data sourced from 6 active outgoing feeders.
